message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "User_App" as UserApp
participant "WebRTC_GW" as WebRTCGW
participant "SkyWay_Server" as SkyWayServer
participant "Target_Peer" as TargetPeer

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /peers
{
  key: "YOUR_API_KEY",
  domain: "localhost",
  turn: true,
  peer_id: "media_caller"
}
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  command_type: "PEERS_CREATE",
  params: {
    peer_id: "media_caller",
    token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11"
  }
}

WebRTCGW --> SkyWayServer: CREATE PEER
SkyWayServer --> WebRTCGW: SUCCESS (to bind peer id)

WebRTCGW -> UserApp: GET /peers/media_caller/events?
token=pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 200 OK
{
  "event": "s:OPEN",
  params: {
    peer_id: "media_caller",
    token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11"
  }
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /media
is_video=true
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  ip_v4: "172.16.1.106",
  media_id: "vi-9856040d-bd3e-4b33-b121-e3435842e5fc",
  port: 50003
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /media
is_video=false
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  ip_v4: "172.16.1.106",
  media_id: "au-a6c4c82c-9d9c-4e12-a52a-c927ec33793e",
  port: 50004
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /media/rtp
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  "rtp_id": "rc-970f2e5d-4da0-43e7-92b6-796678c104ad",
  "port": 50003,
  "ip_v4": "172.16.1.106"
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /media/rtp
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  "rtp_id": "rc-4044f658-dee5-4aac-a60a-ad133abb4f92",
  "port": 50004,
  "ip_v4": "172.16.1.106"
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: POST /media/connections
peer_id: "media_caller",
token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11",
video: true,
audio: true,
audioReceiveEnabled: true,
video_params: {
  band_width: 1500,
  media_id: "vi-9856040d-bd3e-4b33-b121-e3435842e5fc",
  rtpc_id: "rc-970f2e5d-4da0-43e7-92b6-796678c104ad",
  payload_type: 100
},
audio_params: {
  band_width: 1500,
  media_id: "au-a6c4c82c-9d9c-4e12-a52a-c927ec33793e",
  rtpc_id: "rc-4044f658-dee5-4aac-a60a-ad133abb4f92",
  payload_type: 111
},
redirect_params: {
  video: {
    ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
    port: 20000
  },
  video_rtcp: {
    ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
    port: 20010
  },
  audio: {
    ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
    port: 20001
  },
  audio_rtcp: {
    ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
    port: 20011
  }
}
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 201 Created
{
  command_type: "MEDIA_CONNECTION_CREATE",
  params: {
    media_connection_id: "mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a"
  }
}

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: GET /media/connections
/mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a/events
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 200 OK
{
  event: "READY"
}

loop
  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: send RTP Video to 172.16.1.106:50001
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect Video with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv Video with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: send RTP Audio to 172.16.1.106:50002
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect Audio with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv Audio with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: send RTCP for Video to 172.16.1.106:50003
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTCP with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv RTCP for Video with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: send RTCP for Audio to 172.16.1.106:50004
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTCP with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv RTCP for Audio with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: redirect RTP Video to 172.16.1.105:20000
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTP Video with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv Video with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: redirect RTP Audio to 172.16.1.105:20001
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTP Audio with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv Audio with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: redirect RTCP for Video to 172.16.1.105:20010
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTCP for Video with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv RTCP for Video with MediaStream

  UserApp -> WebRTCGW: redirect RTCP for Audio to 172.16.1.105:20011
  WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: redirect RTCP for Audio with MediaStream
  SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: recv RTCP for Audio with MediaStream
end

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: Delete /media/connections
/mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a
WebRTCGW -> SkyWayServer: Close MediaStream
SkyWayServer -> TargetPeer: erase Video object and Audio object

UserApp -> WebRTCGW: Delete /peers/media_caller?token=pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11
WebRTCGW --> UserApp: 204 No Content
WebRTCGW --> TargetPeer: disconnect
TargetPeer --> WebRTCGW: 204 No Content

@enduml
